okay, tell me the difference between ola.response:
Okay, so think of it like this – normal train models are like a really good, predictable path. Olama’s train models are… well, they’re a little more adventurous! 

Normal models are trained on a super specific dataset. Olama learns from *everything* – literally the entire internet! That gives it a wider range of responses. 

Normal models are good for specific tasks. Olama’s awesome at creative writing, responding to prompts in a really unique way, and even trying to be a little bit… poetic. 😉

Basically, Olama’s got a broader brain! 😊
